items.name: Bachata Dance 🐕
items.description:
[UPDATE: NEW BACHATA ADDED ] https://www.roblox.com/catalog/107110345971378/El-Jefe-Bachata

[NEW EMOTE UNLOCKED: BACHATA]

Step side, step together, step side, tap—look at you, dancing like you actually know what you’re doing! The Bachata emote brings a touch of elegance to your game, replacing frantic flailing with smooth, swaying steps and easy hip rhythm. It’s the perfect emote for showing off grace under pressure, whether you’re celebrating a victory, distracting a monster, or just trying to look cooler than everyone else.

Warning: While stylish, the Bachata provides no defensive bonuses. Dancing in front of enemies may result in admiration, confusion, or being eaten.

Bring smooth energy to your avatar with the Vibing Idol Emote. This vibing idol emote blends cute emote charm with cool emote style, giving you an idol dance packed with expressive personality. Perfect for anime idol fans, kawaii emote lovers, and anyone who wants an aesthetic dance that stands out. Works as a roblox emote, ugc emote, catalog emote, and fits any avatar animation or character animation setup.
